# Baseline Report: <name>

- ID: `<baseline-id>`
- Version: `v1`
- Related eval: `<eval-id/version>`
- Candidate/system version: `<commit/release>`
- Comparator version/configuration: `<reference | none>`
- Environment: `<immutable environment reference>`
- Run owner: `<role>`
- Run timestamp: `<ISO-8601>`

## Purpose

State the future decision for which this baseline is the comparison point.

## Frozen Inputs

Record scenario-bank versions, datasets, rights/provenance, seeds, configuration, prompts, tools, models, and dependencies.

## Procedure

Provide exact reproducible commands or execution manifest.

## Results

Report hard gates, each graded dimension, scenario-level failures, worst-percentile behavior, cost, latency, resource use, and uncertainty. Label missing measures `unknown`, never zero.

## Product Comparison

When applicable, report blind win/tie/loss, confidence/uncertainty, competitor limitations, and any non-equivalent workflow conditions.

## Control-Plane Results

When applicable, report invariant, concurrency, fault, migration, security, recovery, and real-service outcomes.

## Limitations And Bias

Record coverage gaps, grader limitations, contamination risk, non-equivalent conditions, and claims this baseline cannot support.

## Evidence Manifest

List immutable evidence references and checksums.

## Approval

Record independent review, accepted limitations, timestamp, and report hash.
